data.topic: WordPress Playground blueprint packages for block theme generation - existing tools, libraries, and approaches for generating WordPress block themes programmatically with Blueprint API, including how premium block themes handle complex layouts (CSS grid, backdrop-filter, gradient text) without wp:html blocks
data.complexity_reasoning: Requires surveying external WordPress ecosystem tools, Blueprint API patterns, and how premium themes solve the wp:html vs core blocks portability problem — none of this is answerable from the codebase.
